title: hydrocotyle oligantha
intro: Hydrocotyle oligantha, also known as small leaf pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle oligantha include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
